profile.name: Aniket Kumar Mishra
profile.title: Financial Data Analyst | Automation Specialist | Certified AI Professional

professional_summary: Financial Data Analyst with 10+ years of experience bridging Finance and Data Engineering. Specialises in building automated data pipelines that transform messy financial data into actionable insights. Expert in Excel, VBA, and Power Query. Recently engineered a Big Data ETL solution processing 6 million+ records (1.5 GB) for a Real Estate portfolio. Certified Artificial Intelligence Professional (KHDA Attested | CPD Certified | London Chamber | Grade: A++ Excellent). Currently completing AI, Data Science & Machine Learning programme at LISRC (Jun 2026). Immediately available in Dubai.

experience.role: Senior Financial Analyst & Data Automation Lead
experience.key_achievement: Engineered ETL pipeline processing 6 million+ records (1.5 GB) reducing reporting from days to minutes
bullets: Engineered a robust ETL pipeline using Power Query & VBA to process 6 million+ records (1.5 GB), reducing financial reporting time from days to minutes and enabling real-time forecasting for a Real Estate data warehouse.
Built complex VBA-based financial models to analyse variance trends across manufacturing clients, identifying cost leakages of up to 15%.
Replaced static PDF audit reports with interactive Power BI dashboards for P&L and Cash Flow analysis.
Designed data-driven AML monitoring structures ensuring compliance with UAE Central Bank regulations; implemented KYC workflow automation.
Developed automated financial reporting templates eliminating manual reconciliation, saving 8+ hours per reporting cycle.
Developed custom Excel-based cost-tracking software using advanced VBA macros to monitor daily project expenses, eliminating the need for expensive third-party tools.
Prepared daily cost analysis reports, cash flow audits, and customer feedback analytics for senior management.
Maintained and optimised operational systems for finance and accounting functions, identifying and resolving key process inefficiencies.
Built a complete accounting and inventory management system from scratch using Excel for a pharmaceutical client, replacing a manual paper-based process.
Managed VAT returns, Balance Sheet preparation, and conducted internal audits to ensure regulatory accuracy.
Introduced automated stock reconciliation tools, reducing inventory discrepancies and improving audit trail documentation.
Managed full-cycle financial analysis, VAT return preparation, and data documentation across multiple client accounts.
Prepared monthly financial summaries and reconciliation reports ensuring accuracy of all financial records.

education.degree: AI, Data Science and Machine Learning
education.institution: London International Studies and Research Centre (LISRC)
